raw_request: Provide one authoritative validated metrics record for synthetic segment S-9 that states both the bot-adjusted 30-day retention and the corresponding eligible sample size, with its evidence ID; this is a retry because the prior access response was ambiguous and supplied no evidence.
intent: Both controlling metrics are required to apply the disclosed release rule, and the prior ambiguous access response did not provide usable evidence.
requested_scope: One validated controlling-metrics record for synthetic segment S-9 covering only bot-adjusted 30-day retention and corresponding eligible sample size for the applicable 30-day window.
expected_value_basis: Release is supported only if the validated bot-adjusted retention is at least 10% and the validated eligible sample size is at least 500; a value below either threshold prevents release, while unavailable or inconclusive controlling values may require hold or escalation.
